utility_evaluation.REASONING:

4. accommodation: Fully specified (hotel name, type, cost breakdown, amenities) → included.
5. activities: Fully specified (activity name, duration, dates, cost) → included.
6. additional_services: Fully specified (service type, cost) → included.
7. total_budget: Fully specified (breakdown with items and grand total) → included.
All 7 required items are present and properly detailed.
